item.title: World Flag Quiz | Guess 195 Country Flags — Geography Challenge
item.description: Test your world geography! Guess all 195 country flags in timed or relaxed mode. Track your score by continent. Free flag quiz game — no download needed.

item.title: K-Meme Quiz | 한국 인터넷 밈 퀴즈 — 당신의 밈력은?
item.description: 한국 인터넷 밈 퀴즈! 뇌절, 갓생, 현타, 찐친... 50개 이상의 K-밈 중 10문제를 풀며 당신의 밈 지수를 확인하세요. 점수 공유 가능!

item.title: AI 20 Questions | Think of something — AI will guess it
item.description: Challenge the AI mind reader! Think of anything from K-Food, K-Pop, Animals, Tech, Places, or Memes — AI uses information theory to guess it in 20 questions.

item.title: JSON Formatter & Validator - Free Online Tool | pure-flon
item.description: Free online JSON formatter, validator, and beautifier. Paste your JSON to format, minify, validate with syntax highlighting and error detection. No sign-up required.

item.title: Pomodoro Timer - Free Online Focus Timer | pure-flon
item.description: Free online Pomodoro timer for focused work sessions. 25-minute work intervals, customizable durations, session tracking, audio notifications, and fullscreen mode. No sign-up required.

item.title: Free QR Code Generator — URL, WiFi, vCard | Pure-Flon
item.description: Generate QR codes instantly for URLs, text, WiFi networks, and vCards. Download as PNG or SVG. Free, client-side, no data sent to servers.

item.title: Best Free Developer Tools in 2026 — Our Top Picks | pure-flon blog
item.description: 20 best free developer tools in 2026. From JSON formatters to AI coding assistants — boost your productivity without spending a dime.

item.title: Korean Honorifics Explained Simply | pure-flon blog
item.description: A complete guide to Korean honorifics and speech levels. Learn when to use oppa, unnie, nim, yo, and the 7 Korean speech levels with interactive examples.

item.title: AI Color Palette Generator — Free Online Tool | Pure-Flon
item.description: Generate beautiful, harmonious color palettes from any seed color. Export as CSS variables, Tailwind config, or image. Free, no login required.

item.title: How AI Guesses What You're Thinking in Just 4 Questions | pure-flon blog
item.description: Learn how Shannon entropy and information theory let an AI guess what you're thinking in just 4 questions. Interactive examples and a playable game inside.

item.title: Top 10 Korean Foods Foreigners Love (And Where to Start) | pure-flon blog
item.description: Discover the top 10 Korean foods loved by foreigners worldwide. From Korean fried chicken to bibimbap — your ultimate K-food starter guide with spice levels and fun facts.
